name: String Cheese Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the bread at an angle into 1-inch slices, but do not cut all the way through to the bottom.
2. Spread the mixture evenly between the slices.
3. Wrap in foil and grill 5-6 inches from coals until the cheese is melted.
4. Unwrap and grill for an additional 5 minutes.
